name: blackvectr-monorepo
description: Premium digital agency website — Next.js frontend + Express/Prisma backend in one repo.

scripts.build: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.start: concurrently -n FRONTEND,BACKEND -c blue,green "npm --prefix frontend run start" "npm --prefix backend run start"
scripts.setup: node scripts/ensure-env.mjs && npm install && npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix backend run db:setup
